programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: South Park's 14th Annual Cow Days rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls. Meanwhile, someone has stolen the Cow Memorial statue, and newcomers Tom and Mary are blamed for the theft.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: July 14, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.desc: The new head of the Priority Murder Squad investigates the murder of an unknown woman.

programme.title: The Closer: About Face

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Picture
programme.desc: The team investigates when big names are found to be clients of a murdered prostitute.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must put aside their differences when they investigate the case of a college student who died in a tunnel. Meanwhile, Frankie Sr. returns with news that upsets Angela.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: This Is How a Heart Breaks
programme.desc: When Maura meets a new guy named Dennis in a very unusual way, he opens up a different side of her. Meanwhile, Jane is filled with mixed emotions after someone from her past returns.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Welcome to the Dollhouse
programme.desc: Young female professionals dressed as dolls are turning up dead on the public transit system and Jane and Maura must piece together the clues. Meanwhile, Angela implements new ideas for the café and Jane learns more about how Casey was injured.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Parker/ Robinson
programme.desc: One family puts all their energy into a son they claim is a hip hop star while ignoring their other four children. The other are more obsessed with tracking the 'swamp ape' then spending time with their only son.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Stamper/ Haggerty
programme.desc: A mom whose heart is in the medieval past and whose head is in the clouds swaps places with a 21st century wife and mother who juggles family life and works two jobs.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Ridgely/ Corrao
programme.desc: It is grit versus glamour when a rodeo barrel racer nicknamed 'Cowgirl Jen' trades families with a luxury-living hair stylist named Kim. Fists fly in the most explosive table meeting ever, and the couples' reunion ignites an angry shouting match.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Left For Dead
programme.desc: Armed with DNA and a license plate from a particularly violent rape case, a detective thinks he has an easy case to crack. But neither provides a match. The case goes cold until the ground-breaking ‘Combined DNA Index System’ finds a hit years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Atlanta Bombings
programme.desc: In 1996, one person was killed and hundreds were injured when a bomb went off at the Atlanta Olympics. Five more bombs would be detonated, and the FBI, ATF and GBI realize they are looking for a serial bomber.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Life and Death of Anna Nicole Smith
programme.desc: Uncovering how Anna Nicole Smith's lavish lifestyle may have contributed to her mysterious death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Wizard battles a violent storm while Josh and Casey fish in 30-foot seas and the Southern Wind takes two rogue waves. Wild Bill is on the brink of collapse after working 72 straight hours.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Tight Spaces
programme.desc: En route to explore a cave, Mike Rowe and his dirty crew reminisce about classic jobs from the show's history that had them squirming into tight spaces. They also check in with some of the hard-working people that have been featured on the program.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Dirty Infrastructure
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and his dirty crew hit the highway to see the sights and reminisce about classic American infrastructure jobs from the show's history. Along the way they check in with some of the hard-working men and women that keep the country moving.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Mystery of F/V Destination
programme.desc: Just miles from the fleet, the fishing vessel Destination disappears without a trace. In an unprecedented investigation, the mystery can finally be solved. But captains must make big changes, or risk sailing into the same peril on the icy Bering Sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Tight Spaces

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Dirty Infrastructure
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and his dirty crew hit the highway to see the sights and reminisce about classic American infrastructure jobs from the show's history. Along the way they check in with some of the hard-working men and women that keep the country moving.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Mystery of F/V Destination
programme.desc: Just miles from the fleet, the fishing vessel Destination disappears without a trace. In an unprecedented investigation, the mystery can finally be solved. But captains must make big changes, or risk sailing into the same peril on the icy Bering Sea.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sex, Lies, and the Taj Mahal
programme.desc: The Taj Mahal is one of the world's most beautiful monuments, but new investigations reveal its dark secrets. Scientists are uncovering codes that tell a shocking story of power and betrayal, challenging everything we thought we knew about the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets at the Palace
programme.desc: We reveal the centuries-old secrets and mysteries of one of the most remarkable examples of Victorian engineering. Follow the cutting-edge technology that built the Palace of Westminster, and find how it paved the way for today's skyscrapers.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mayan City of Blood
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, the lost city of Chichen Itza contains ancient secrets of a mysterious civilization. Follow the scientists working to find how the city of Chichen Itza was built, and how the bloody rite of human sacrifice shaped the city.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Egypt
programme.desc: Seven wonders of ancient Egypt are home to mysteries still unsolved thousands of years after their construction, and today, investigators use cutting-edge tech and forensic analysis to reveal new secrets of these colossal engineering marvels.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Josh travels to Turkey and Hungary searching for the heart of a former ruler.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Metal Library
programme.desc: Josh travels through the jungles of Ecuador to explore the watery depths of Tayos Cave for a legendary set of metal plates believed to be created by an advanced ancient civilization.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Karate Kids
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric start the babies in preschool to help with their development but worry about leaving them. The older boys try karate but face a tough decision when it comes time to choose between their other sports. Courtney and Eric tour mobile homes.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Time for Time Outs
programme.desc: It's time-out time at the Waldrop house as Courtney and Eric start disciplining the sextuplets. The big boys are treated to a fun getaway, leaving Ramona and Popsie alone with all six babies. The family receives shocking news about their new mobile home.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Toddlers and Turkeys
programme.desc: Courtney and the babies are running late to Kayleigh's wedding because of a dead car battery. The Waldrop family moves 11 people into a 1,500 square foot mobile home during construction, right before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Counting On: Still Growing: La La Land
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy are getting ready to start their new lives in LA and take a road trip across the country to get there. In Arkansas, Joy and Austin grieve the loss of their baby girl. Later, John and Abbie reveal their baby's gender in a big way!

programme.title: Counting On: Beverly Hills Duggars
programme.desc: Jana and Jinger hit up Beverly Hills for some shopping but quickly get some sticker shock when Jinger falls in love with a pricey jacket. In Arkansas, the girls enjoy a Mom's Day In. They dig deep as they answer questions about pregnancy and motherhood.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: 30,000 Dirty Diapers
programme.desc: The Waldrops are feeling a little cramped in their mobile home as construction starts on their house. Courtney wants to combine nine birthdays and potty train six toddlers.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Coronavirus Changes Everything
programme.desc: As the threat of coronavirus rises, the Busbys must deal with homeschooling their six daughters and juggling birthday plans amidst the crisis. Hazel's appointment is coming up, but the Busbys aren't sure if it will happen and what the outcome will be.

programme.title: Rattled: We're Now Professional Diaper Changers
programme.desc: Babies are shaking up the lives of new and expectant parents. Autumn and Matthew face a challenge bigger than raising a baby on their tiny boat.

programme.title: Rattled: Holy Triplets
programme.desc: Autumn and Matthew try to set aside their differences for the sake of their baby. After three miscarriages, Julia and Ryan pray she can carry their triplets to term. Matt shocks Jamielynn with career news.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Fournado Warning
programme.desc: It's birthday season in the Busby house! As the Quints turn four, Riley navigates her first day of Pre-K, Hazel adjusts to her big girl glasses, and the girls say goodbye to nighttime diapers. Adam's new job means major stress for Danielle.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Kelly/ Lauren
programme.desc: Kelly's history of miscarriages keeps her from telling her mom. Lauren is afraid of her father's explosive reaction.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Krystal/ Danie
programme.desc: Krystal is keeping the baby a secret from her mother-in-law due to their dire financial situation. Dannie fears that if she tells her dad she's pregnant he will reject her child the way he rejected Danie as a kid.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Charity/ Natasha
programme.desc: Two women are hiding their pregnancies for very different reasons. Charity already has five children and Natasha thinks her boyfriend will leave her.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Ashley/ Amatualla
programme.desc: Ashley fears her family will disapprove of her pregnancy as she's expecting her fourth child. Amatulla is ashamed of being pregnant again with James's baby.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Aaron's Story
programme.desc: Since the death of his mother, Aaron has lived at home to care for his aging father. But due to his food addiction, Aaron has to heavily rely on his father for help instead. Now, Aaron must learn to care for himself to avoid eating himself to death.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: LaShanta's Story
programme.desc: A mother of four, bed-bound for two years, Lashanta relies on her kids to keep her cleaned and fed. Her last chance to break the cycle of food addiction that's killing her is to join Dr. Now's program, but it'll take an army to get her out the door.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chad's Story
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, Chad's weight is dangerously out of control. After gastric bypass surgery, he quickly sheds pounds but faces a medical crisis when he does not follow the doctor's orders. In dire straits, Chad puts his weight-loss journey on the line.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Life is good for Britney Allen, making her the envy of all girls at Pacific Vista High School. All comes to a halt when her father's job moves them out of their posh neighbourhood forcing Britney to join the squad of her rival school.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On

programme.desc: Prisoner Edward Harold Bell has retracted his confession. Lise and Olsen look into the only man ever convicted for any of the eleven murders and uncover shocking inconsistencies, unlawful police tactics, and a deadly miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: The Eleven: Motel Murder
programme.desc: Investigators Lise Olsen and Fred Paige are determined to find justice for 11 girls murdered in Galveston County.

programme.title: The Hunt for the Zodiac Killer: The New Suspect
programme.desc: A new hunt for the mysterious Zodiac Killer gains unprecedented access to files, unearthing a complicated cypher that may contain the killer's name, and links between the Zodiac Killer and an unsolved case.

programme.title: The Hunt for the Zodiac Killer: The Military Connection
programme.desc: The group discovers that the Zodiac Killer possibly served in the U.S. Armed Forces, thanks to the rare symbols used by the killer that a supercomputer locates. New evidence brings Sal and Ken closer to uncovering the killer's identity.

programme.title: The Hunt for the Zodiac Killer: A New Code Uncovered
programme.desc: The group discovers a new cipher of the Zodiac Killer. Meanwhile, the supercomputer makes connections between lunar patterns and the killings. A riddle may lead to the discovery of a corpse. Another prime suspect appears.

programme.title: The Hunt for the Zodiac Killer: The Secret FBI Files
programme.desc: With the release of some secret files on the Zodiac Killer, the hunt ramps up the intensity. A handwriting analyst matches the Zodiac's letters to a letter mailed to Albany, N.Y., 3000 miles away. The code team makes major progress with the Z-340.

programme.title: The Hunt for the Zodiac Killer: The Code Is Cracked
programme.desc: Sal and Ken investigate San Francisco, the epicenter of the Zodiac Killer murders, as the Code Team announces extraordinary news. A team member has solved the Zodiac's infamous Z340 code, which has eluded codebreakers for 50 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Obsession/ The Killer You Know
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers embark on a manhunt after the murder of a young couple. The search for the cold-blooded killer takes them across three states. In Cleveland, a man is shot in his own backyard.

programme.title: The First 48: Easy Money/ Ambushed
programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bacon for Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team heads to a small town in Louisiana to investigate some unusual activity.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Sketching Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to the California/ Nevada border to investigate audio recordings of a possible Sasquatch obtained near Lake Tahoe. While blasting calls throughout multiple valleys in the Sierras, they discover some of their best evidence to date.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Return to Boggy Creek
programme.desc: The team travels to Fouke, home of the 1972 bigfoot documentary 'The Legend of Boggy Creek.'

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: Biggest Search Yet
programme.desc: Find out what the team thinks as they head to the Four Corners, where Arizona, Colorado, New Mexico and Utah meet in an unusually squatchy area.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: Live to Squatch Another Day
programme.desc: Flashing forward to the final night in OK it appears that our team has finally spotted a Sasquatch. They use a cherry picker and some music to lure in the beast. Our team of investigators find themselves in very real danger during their final night.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatching in the Midnight Sun
programme.desc: New evidence brings the team back to Alaska, where they decide to divide and conquer. While Matt and Bobo are down in the small village of Bethel, Ranae and Cliff are investigating near Fairbanks.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Moonshine and Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to Kentucky to investigate a piece of footage that seems to show the glowing eyes of a bigfoot.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.desc: The team travels to Kentucky to investigate a piece of footage that seems to show the glowing eyes of a bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bacon for Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team heads to a small town in Louisiana to investigate some unusual activity.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Surfing Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and his best mate Wes set out on an adventure through the wild islands of Indonesia looking for the best surf. Both accomplished surfers, the pair encounter some of the more venomous snakes of Indonesia as well as lizards and mischievous monkeys.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Last Primates of Madagascar
programme.desc: For some 100 million years the flora and fauna of Madagascar have evolved utterly independent of the rest of the world. Steve travels to this unique biosphere to leap with lemurs, a rare, ancient species of primate.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Graham's Revenge
programme.desc: The adventure continues at the Australia Zoo as Steve has to capture the one crocodile that has actually had a taste of his flesh. A few weeks after successfully moving Graham into a new enclosure, the croc gets his revenge.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: It's a Baby Giraffe!
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in the Australia Zoo's Mammal Department as Rosie the Giraffe is ready to give birth. Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that's entered an enclosure, and Terri helps the keepers wrangle Chief the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Pawning Terri's Heart
programme.desc: Terri attends the exam of Charlie the Tiger to determine if his tumors were successfully treated. Bindi and the Small Mammal Team help develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian Devil. Robert discovers the true genders of the Zoo's shingleback lizards.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Life in Lockdown
programme.desc: It's all Irwins on deck when the zoo closes due to the global pandemic. Terri must race to find funds to keep all the animals fed, while newlyweds Bindi and Chandler jump in, trading their honeymoon for hard work, and Robert faces a risky python rescue.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Long Road to Redemption Part One
programme.desc: In this first half of a two-part road to redemption competition, seven past competitors who fell short return to the forge for a second chance at glory and redemption. They aren't merely trying to beat one another, there is a new twist and a big prize.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Long Road to Redemption Part Two
programme.desc: In the second half of the Road to Redemption competition four former smiths remain, each competing for a second chance to become a Forged in Fire Champion.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Hollywood Edition
programme.desc: In this special episode, four bladesmiths pay homage to the blade craft of Hollywood. Their first mission is to forge a survival knife to make John Rambo proud. The final smiths must recreate Hattori Hanzo's 1000-layer Katana from 'Kill Bill.'

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Sawback Hunting Sword
programme.desc: Bladesmiths create the ultimate wilderness weapon: the German Sawback Hunting Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Anthropomorphic Sword

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Rookies Edition

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Bhuj

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Hussar Saber

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw

programme.title: Snapped: Betty Broderick Sneak Peek
programme.desc: In a case that became a media firestorm, a powerful lawyer and his new bride are slain, and detectives try to track down a scorned socialite, unearthing twisted tales of adultery, restraining orders, and alleged abuse.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Deep Trouble

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Conspiracy

programme.title: Snapped: Teresa Stone
programme.desc: A secret affair between a woman and her church’s pastor becomes public when they become suspects in a murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Jane Reth
programme.desc: A college romance goes cold and ends with a murder that takes 22 years to solve.

programme.title: Snapped: She Made Me Do It: Mary Sharpski
programme.desc: A man is brutally attacked by a machete wielding ninja and his wife's friends are suspects. Did they act alone or at her request?

programme.title: Snapped: She Made Me Do It: Veronica Paz
programme.desc: A star athlete is killed and burned. His on-again/ off-again lover blames her high school sweetheart. He claims she made him do it.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers' car is abandoned in Bardstown, KY, the mother of 5 vanished. A year later her father is shot dead while searching for her. We discover there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: The Search Continues
programme.desc: The brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown Police Officer is grilled by the FBI. Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent. On the Bluegrass Parkway the scene of a deadly ambush is explored.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Cold And Calculating
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer. Family members of Bardstown's other victims speak. A mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: A Murder Most Foul
programme.desc: As the 1st anniversary of Tommy Ballard's killing approaches, Stephanie and Dwayne dive deeper into the unsolved cases after a new witness steps forward. An unexpected new lead takes them in an unforeseen and intriguing direction.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Final Days in Bardstown
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne speak with an informant who shares new information about the crimes in Bardstown. They follow up on the informant's claims and discover potential new details unknown to investigators.

programme.title: The Killer Affair: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: When police investigate the murder of a Private Investigator the trail leads them to a wealthy woman who had affairs with both a father and his son.

programme.title: The Killer Affair: Murder in New Orleans
programme.desc: A young mother's passionate affair with an old boyfriend ignites suspicion when someone close to both of them is murdered.

programme.title: The Killer Affair: His Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: The lifelong friendship of two men is threatened when they both love the same woman, leading investigators to suspect murder when one of them disappears.

programme.title: Movie: Logan
programme.desc: Logan, whose power to self-heal is dwindling, takes care of Professor X in hiding. A young girl, hunted by a shadowy corporation for her connection to Logan, finds them. As the three fight to escape, Logan must decide how to use his remaining powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Crepes of Wrath
programme.desc: Bart is sent to France for a student-exchange program, where is hosts are a family of winemakers who plan to use him as a slave. The student that stays with the Simpsons is a spy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VIII
programme.desc: Homer battles mutants, Bart morphs with a fly and Marge tells the history of Halloween.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Tales From the Public Domain
programme.desc: Homer receives a letter from the library notifying him about a long overdue book.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Four Springfielders are prompted to try to right past regrets following the funeral of a beloved neighbour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Courier With Love

programme.desc: For Thanksgiving, Charles decides to cook dinner for the staff at the clinic.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of Alien Relics
programme.desc: New investigations into mysterious alien relics from lost civilizations could reveal shocking truths from the ancient world. Using the latest archaeological methods, experts could reveal the secrets of mystical knowledge from long ago.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Aliens of the Abyss
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates top-secret reports of underwater alien activity, and with the help o cutting-edge science, he reveals the truth behind a close encounter between the US military and a UFO with out-of-this world technology.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: The Screaming Mummy Conspiracy
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the screaming mummy have haunted archaeologists for decades, and now, experts uncover new evidence to reveal the treacherous conspiracy that led to this mummy's grisly end.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Aliens of the Abyss
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates top-secret reports of underwater alien activity, and with the help o cutting-edge science, he reveals the truth behind a close encounter between the US military and a UFO with out-of-this world technology.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: The Screaming Mummy Conspiracy
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the screaming mummy have haunted archaeologists for decades, and now, experts uncover new evidence to reveal the treacherous conspiracy that led to this mummy's grisly end.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Uranus and Neptune: Rise of the Ice Giants
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are mysterious, icy worlds at the edge of our solar system, and new discoveries reveal that these strange planets might have helped start life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Jobs
programme.desc: Meet people with the strangest jobs in the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Vehicles
programme.desc: Flying using only water power; an underwater car; a boat that is built to deliberately sink; a huge plane style boat that might revolutionize travel.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Inventions
programme.desc: A man creates a robot duplicate of himself; 'pixie dust' can re-grow a lost limb; superhero transgenic spider-goat; a machine that makes cyborgs out of people.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places to Sleep
programme.desc: Go inside the astonishing science of the world's strangest places to sleep. In Sweden, visitors can stay at an invisible hotel. A couple has converted a relic of the cold war into a family home. And learn how to sleep in a pressurized tin can for 28 days.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Explosions
programme.desc: Explore truly bizarre explosions including an unconventional summer camp for teens with a bombastic curriculum and haute couture fashion that could save your life.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Underground
programme.desc: Featuring the largest collection of mummies; the secret bunker below New York's Grand Central Terminal; hundreds of miles of tunnels that lie beneath Las Vegas; astronomers who look at the stars two miles underground.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places
programme.desc: An American lake that swallows land and boats; a road in Scotland where gravity seems to be suspended and cars roll up hills; an island where tourists get their kicks surfing the jet streams of planes.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Honeytrap
programme.desc: An aspiring young boxer leaves in night to meet girl who added him on Facebook. The next day he if sound dead in his car and the murder reveals a dark family secret kept hidden for over 30 years.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: Greg May, 56, is getting ready to move to Florida with a new girlfriend when he vanishes without a trace. Police aren't sure if the tattoo artist turned Civil War collector is alive or dead until their investigation uncovers a horrific plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Carnage
programme.desc: Elizabeth Palmer works with Matt Scott in Southern California's housing industry. When their brutally murdered bodies are discovered side by side in their office, investigators are initially stumped by the gruesome execution style killings.

programme.title: Dateline: Finding Savanna
programme.desc: A mother disappears with her 11-month-old daughter after losing a hotly contested custody battle. The father’s epic search for his child spans four continents and nearly two decades, with heartbreaking twists and an emotional conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A young woman was abducted in Ecuador and, as her family and investigators raced to save her, she plotted to save herself. Her daring plan involved a little something hidden at the bottom of her bag.

programme.title: Dateline: Lost in Sin City
programme.desc: A small town girl moved to the big city of Las Vegas, where she found a new career and a new love. But then she vanished. Within days, police found her body. But finding who killed her would be a tougher mystery to crack.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Little Girl Gone
programme.desc: In 1988, a nine year-old girl goes missing in Great Falls, Montana. Years after the case goes cold, a chance bus stop encounter breathes new life into the investigation, leading detectives to the horrifying truth behind the girl's disappearance.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Accusation
programme.desc: When a Naval Officer is apparently raped and stabbed by a coworker, a mysterious VHS tape suggests the victim may have been silenced to prevent a scandal. Dogged investigation and cutting edge forensic science reveals a shocking murder plot.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: When the brutalized body of an eight year-old boy is found in the woods outside Gary, Indiana, investigators begin a decades-long search for a sadistic child-killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Hometown Homicide
programme.desc: In 1980, a Hemet, California businessman comes home to find his wife brutally murdered. Was she a random victim, or did she know her killer? Investigators sift through shifty suspects and shaky alibis before closing in on a remorseless killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: Double Cross
programme.desc: Four best friends, two married couples, multiple sordid secrets, one huge betrayal and a murder. With exclusive interviews and never-before-aired home movie footage, this is a story about how a love affair resulted in a crime of passion.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Operation Hero
programme.desc: Mark and his team take on their hardest build ever for their most important client: America's wounded warriors. The guys work side by side with veterans to construct a giant timber frame lodge for Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Family Builds
programme.desc: For some off-grid builders, it's family first. But when family is on the line, the stakes are even higher. From an artsy mountain abode to an Ozark container paradise, these builds are sure to create a lifetime of family memories.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.desc: Designing duo Dave and Teresa face off against vintage experts Laurie and Bobbi.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Refurbished and Redesigned Table, Chairs and Bench Vs. a Sled Bench, a Saw Table and Yolk
programme.desc: Married Couples in a Battle of Flipping Skills.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cajun Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Texas and Louisiana to feast on classic Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Dad's Sticky Ribs and Decadent Cookies
programme.desc: Michael turns the backyard grill into a smoker to make his dad's favourite sticky ribs. Then, he makes grilled potato salad as his wife turns his dad's obsession with chocolate into giant cookies infuses with chocolate, crunchy pretzel and sea salt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked

programme.desc: The PJ Masks are enticed by a fake An Yu to break all the rules, and have a party on Mystery Mountain. An Yu tries to domesticate the wild Wolfies!

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Garage Alone/ Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: When a thief is on the loose, Goofy and Pluto try to protect the garage. The Happy Helpers fill in as counselors for the day at a summer camp.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Everybody Wash Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mystery of the Secret Gift-Giver/ Mystery at the Cooking Contest
programme.desc: When townspeople start receiving anonymous gifts, Mira searches for the secret gift-giver. Then, Pinky's dishes for the Queen's cooking contest seem to be sabotaged.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Motsuki's Missing Sister / Not So Ninja
programme.desc: The PJs offer to help Motsuki find Luna, but miss plot by Night Ninja in the process. When the Ninjalinos lose their ninja powers, the PJ Masks teach them alternative skills.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Pinball/ Bounce-a-Tron
programme.desc: The team thwarts Romeo's plan to play a game of pinball in the city with wrecking balls. Catboy wants to prove he is great by stopping Night Ninja on his own.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pit Stop and Go!/ Alarm on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's the first 'Pit Stop and Go Rally' where pit crews compete against each other. The Happy Helpers look after Clara Cluck's farm while she's out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy Squared/ Gekko's Super Gekko Sense
programme.desc: Romeo’s multiplying machine accidentally makes Catboy copies. Night Ninja challenges the PJ Masks to a game of Capture the Flag with the PJ Mask headquarters as the prize.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Babysitter
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick Tock Time Machine accidentally turns Mickey, Minnie, Donald, Daisy and Pluto into toddlers, Goofy steps in to babysit and gets a little help from Mother Goose Clarabelle.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy's Drive-In / The Iron Mouse
programme.desc: Everyone works together to save Goofy's favourite drive-in theater.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Trouble at Floochi's!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Mooo-sical
programme.desc: Everyone is excited because Clarabelle is putting on a musical about nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Chef Goofy on the Go!
programme.desc: Let's ride with Mickey helping Chef Goofy On the Go serve up food far and wide.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Ball
programme.desc: Pluto loses his favourite ball when he's outside playing with it and bounces it too high.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and the Enchanted Egg
programme.desc: Mickey finds an egg, which soon hatches a baby dragon.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Handy Helpers
programme.desc: When the Handy Helpers go limp, Mickey discovers the Clubhouse machine is broken.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mousekeball!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake introduces the Clubhouse pals to a high-tech new game, Floatin' Fun-Time Mousekeball! But when the ball with a mind of its own escapes, the game takes to the skies!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy in Training
programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Chuggington: Rock 'N' Rollers/ Spy Train
