programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop Lazlo!/ The Hot Diggity Dog Show
programme.desc: When Commander Heist tries to steal Von Drake's Smarty Hat, Heist's cat gets in the way. The Happy Helpers get called to be pet groomers for The Hot Doggity Dog Show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Donald's Garage/ Artful Helpers
programme.desc: While Mickey is away, Donald is left in charge and tries to improve the garage. The Happy Helpers are asked to guard a valuable painting at the Hot Dog Hills' Fancy Art Museum.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hanami Hijinks! / Happy Harajuku Helpers!
programme.desc: Daisy wants to celebrate Hanami with a perfect picnic, unfortunately things go a little haywire! The Happy Helpers participate in the annual Harajuku Fest in Tokyo!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Topsy Turvy Tiffin Mystery/ Mystery at the Invention Fair
programme.desc: When Mikku and Chikku accidentally mix up the tiffin delivery, Mira helps set things right. At the Jalpur Invention Fair, an important piece of Dhruv's invention goes missing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pigs and Pugs/ Bob Loves Mona
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Doc McStuffins Goes McMobile/ Chip Off the Ol' Box
programme.desc: Doc and her dad build a mobile clinic so she can fix toys when she’s away from her clinic. While practicing their Juggling Jacks Act, Big Jack hurts his crank.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead: Egypt's Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Follow a team of archaeologists as they examine a rare mass grave dating to the collapse of ancient Egypt's Old Kingdom, when political infighting and a changing climate brought down a dynasty in a moment of crisis and catastrophe.

programme.title: Professor T.: Of Passion

programme.title: Independent Lens: Dolores

programme.desc: An interior designer returns to Utah to spearhead a hotel renovation for the annual Christmas Eve show run by her former boyfriend. When she steps in to dance in the show's finale with him, she is torn between her job, family and feelings.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: Two strangers who share a disdain for Christmas navigate their holiday complications together by creating The Mistletoe Promise. As they spend more time with each other, they discover there may be more to their contract.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: Movie: A Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job at a ritzy NYC hotel, a woman accepts a job as a governess to a young girl. She finds herself attracted to the girl’s father, who is king of the country, and love reigns over the kingdom.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Debbie Matenopoulos and guest co-host Ali Fedotowsky-Manno welcome saxophonist Dave Koz and he performs.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Holiday
programme.desc: A royal princess runs off from her obligations for a few days to see how the other half lives around Christmas. She winds up falling for a good Samaritan who is unaware of her real identity.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Bottom Bitch
programme.desc: Butters is determined to get his first kiss so his friends won't make fun of him anymore. Soon he's running his own ring of girls who will kiss for money and runs into trouble with some pimps.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: The actions of a renegade gamer threaten to destroy Blizzard Entertainment's World of Warcraft. The fate of the game now lies in the hands of Cartman and the gang who dedicate their lives to defeating the mad gamer and saving the World of Warcraft.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: Hummels and Heroin
programme.desc: Beloved entertainers are being cut down in their prime due to massive overdoses of opiates. Stan is about to be exposed as the source of the illegal drugs.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: July 15, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: South Park: South Park Is Gay!
programme.desc: The boys are hot to be gay once the metrosexual craze hits South Park. Meanwhile, Mr. Garrison accuses the Queer Eye guys of selling out.

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!
programme.desc: Once again Mrs. Garrison gets dumped. But this time she takes it out on the class. When the bar Mrs. Garrison finds solace in is about to be taken over by Persian club owners, she fights to save the one place that lets her be the woman she is.

programme.title: The Closer: Flashpoint

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Throwing Down the Gauntlet
programme.desc: Jane looks for a way for Maura to meet her biological mother, Dr. Hope Davis. Meanwhile, Angela gets involved in a political campaign and a nun from Jane and Frankie Jr.'s past returns.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money Maker
programme.desc: A rich financier is found stuffed in a trashcan wearing a cloak and mask. Meanwhile, Maura makes a deeper connection with her mother and half-sister who still don't know Maura is related to them.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Crazy for You
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Jane finds herself closer to the investigation than she realizes.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dog Shelter
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug's parents have been hiding the truth about his dog, Rocky.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Taste Buds
programme.desc: When Doug doesn't get his way, he tries to brainwash Arthur into wanting what he wants.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Bed Spread
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover a new independence in their lives when they sleep in twin beds.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Less I
programme.desc: When friends begin complimenting Doug on his new svelte figure, Carrie becomes jealous, so Doug decides to take her on a special trip to make her feel better.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Less II
programme.desc: When friends begin complimenting Doug on his new svelte figure, Carrie becomes jealous, so Doug decides to take her on a special trip to make her feel better.

programme.title: The King of Queens: King Pong
programme.desc: Doug asks Arthur to teach him the art of ping-pong after he loses repeatedly to Carrie.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murder in Vegas
programme.desc: A burnt antique trunk was found in the Nevada desert in 1995, filled with charred bones and a skull with five bullet holes. Investigators convicted the killer with help from a method used in the era of Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Lady in the Barrel
programme.desc: In 1999, a murdered woman and her address book are discovered to have been soaked in a barrel for over 30 years. Detectives must use spectral imaging to recover information for a break in the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Final Days of Whitney Houston
programme.desc: New details surrounding Whitney Houston's last days and her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown are revealed.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Prince: The End
programme.desc: Uncovering the secret struggles the music genius faced, from Prince's early years to the final days leading up to his shocking death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Selena: Fatal Encounter
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of Selena's red-hot career, ambitions and tragic demise. Rare interviews include her close friend and co-fashion designer, the back-up in her band, and a nurse who spoke to Selena and ger killer just before she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lasseter's Gold
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback, following the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold. Josh follows the clues that ultimately lead to a breathtaking conclusion.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates goes on a nationwide treasure hunt to solve the 40-year-old mystery of The Secret. He travels coast-to-coast and back in time using cutting-edge augmented reality and taps into a network of obsessed Secret detectives.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Josh heads to his hometown, where one of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, may have been solved.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Back from Outer Space
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the final frontier, space and what could live out there, all while not leaving his headquarters, of course. Join him as he interviews special, and perhaps extra-terrestrial guests.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle Doomsday
programme.desc: Mysterious reports of boiling seas in the Bermuda Triangle might be evidence of a deadly undersea volcano with a long list of victims. Jeremy Wade investigates the newest discoveries from this strange stretch of water in search of proof.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship
programme.desc: When a mummy is discovered on an abandoned boat, investigators struggle to explain where it came from. Jeremy Wade reveals what happened and the strange forces to blame for this mysterious phenomenon on the high seas.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Josh heads to his hometown, where one of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, may have been solved.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Back from Outer Space
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the final frontier, space and what could live out there, all while not leaving his headquarters, of course. Join him as he interviews special, and perhaps extra-terrestrial guests.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle Doomsday
programme.desc: Mysterious reports of boiling seas in the Bermuda Triangle might be evidence of a deadly undersea volcano with a long list of victims. Jeremy Wade investigates the newest discoveries from this strange stretch of water in search of proof.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship
programme.desc: When a mummy is discovered on an abandoned boat, investigators struggle to explain where it came from. Jeremy Wade reveals what happened and the strange forces to blame for this mysterious phenomenon on the high seas.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Vampire Hunt
programme.desc: In Bulgaria Don uncovers new evidence of vampires. He joins a vampire hunt and looks for clues in a dangerous cave. In Hungary, he meets with a witch who links vampires to witchcraft and visits a jail that held the most famous vampire.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Voodoo's Dark Magic
programme.desc: Don travels to Haiti to experience the mysterious power of voodoo. He gains access to a bloody sacrifice and learns the terrifying truth about zombies.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Demon Woods
programme.desc: Don visits a Virginia town where paranormal activity is spiking and finds a connection to the lost Roanoke colony. Don retraces the path of a mysterious relic and explores whether dark magic brought to the New World could have doomed the settlers.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: The Nazis' Supernatural Weapons
programme.desc: Don gets access to a mysterious Nazi diary. Its dark clues take him to a perilous cave built to hide treasures and a crypt where Nazis held occult ceremonies. Don joins a witches' ritual to see how Hitler tried to use black magic to conquer the world.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Temples of Doom
programme.desc: In Peru Don investigates a deadly ancient cult by undergoing their most terrifying ritual. In remote caves, he finds evidence of a supernatural war. Finally, he uncovers clues about bloody sacrifice...and reveals the truth of this dangerous religion.

programme.title: Buried Worlds With Don Wildman: Devil Swamp
programme.desc: Don investigates dark cults in the Louisiana Bayou. He finds evidence of rituals and joins an exorcism to ward off evil. Don learns from a witch that the land has dark powers. He hunts ghostly orbs said to guard treasure and deadly cryptids.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part One
programme.desc: The Raneys must build a dam and plan an entire cabin move to help the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Teretha's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Teretha's life is confined to a bed, which is a far cry from her former job representing Detroit's healthy eating program. Her adoring family fears losing her, and hopes a gastric bypass is the solution she needs to save her life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley T's Story
programme.desc: Ashley is 24 and lives alone. Her only sources of comfort are food and the relationships she has online. But not a single one of her profiles is real. Soon, Ashley learns that Dr. Now isn't someone she can lie to like her online friends.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Doug's Story
programme.desc: After overcoming a dependence on drugs and alcohol, sneaking food is 660-lb Doug's last remaining vice.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Doug

programme.desc: Robert Irvine heads to T. Phillips Alehouse and Grill in Glendora, California and finds a restaurant that looks more like a dive bar. Owner Jen can't stand up for herself and everyone walks all over her.

programme.title: Chopped: Breakfast Battle
programme.desc: The chefs get bountiful breakfast foods in every basket and are asked to stretch the most important meal of the day into three indulgent courses. They even get to work with farm fresh eggs direct from the chicken coops of judge Martha Stewart!

programme.title: Chopped: There Will Be Bloody Marys

programme.title: Chopped: Food Truck Luck

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Date Night Fry Day

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: You Wanna 'Pizza' Me?

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Lay'er On Me

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Order on the Border
programme.desc: Wardens check hunting camps at the height of deer season. On the Rio Grande River, they stop a Mexican fisherman from poaching in U.S. waters. A Game Warden near Austin must rescue a trapped deer and get it to a rehabber.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Wildlife Round Up
programme.desc: Texas wildlife keeps the wardens on their toes when they must relocate a large herd of pronghorn, investigate the killing of an endangered rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Operation Bear
programme.desc: On the snowy summit of Mount Washington, a search party braves the elements to rescue hikers. Officer McKee attempts to remove a bear from a playground, while Officer Lucas is on a mission to find a group of missing ATVs.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: In Texas people live up close with wildlife, and that means dangerous encounters for humans animals alike. The wardens will have to protect people from aggressive species, and animals from illegal poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose on the Loose
programme.desc: Teams use helicopters to radio-collar moose. The wardens rescue two skiers lost in the backcountry. A drunk sledder is caught and blames his nephew. A warden extinguishes a barn fire. A man with outstanding poaching warrants is arrested.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Take the Plunge
programme.desc: Spring arrives and things start plunging through the ice. The wardens investigate a case of injured bald eagles.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Order on the Border
programme.desc: Wardens check hunting camps at the height of deer season. On the Rio Grande River, they stop a Mexican fisherman from poaching in U.S. waters. A Game Warden near Austin must rescue a trapped deer and get it to a rehabber.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Military Titans
programme.desc: The US military is home to some of the world's most cutting-edge engineering projects. Special behind-the-scenes access reveals the advanced technology and innovative design methods required to build and operate them.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Secrets of the Supertanker
programme.desc: The world's biggest oil tanker is longer than four football fields and can haul 15,000 trucks worth of oil, and thanks to cutting-edge maritime engineering, this record-breaking vessel makes its deliveries across rough seas quicker and safer than ever.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside the Tesla Gigafactory
programme.desc: Special access to Tesla's record-breaking Gigafactory reveals its bold ambition to build one of the most advanced cars in the world; this cutting-edge facility is one of the world's largest, representing the frontier of engineering innovation.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Secrets of the Supertanker
programme.desc: The world's biggest oil tanker is longer than four football fields and can haul 15,000 trucks worth of oil, and thanks to cutting-edge maritime engineering, this record-breaking vessel makes its deliveries across rough seas quicker and safer than ever.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside the Tesla Gigafactory
programme.desc: Special access to Tesla's record-breaking Gigafactory reveals its bold ambition to build one of the most advanced cars in the world; this cutting-edge facility is one of the world's largest, representing the frontier of engineering innovation.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: New discoveries in the Amazon are revealing evidence of a long-lost civilization that built giant cities of untold treasures. With the help of the latest tech and cutting-edge archaeology, experts investigate the clues these mysterious people left behind.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Archaeologists are finding hard proof of the prehistoric civilization that once thrived in the Amazon, and with the help of cutting-edge technology, these new discoveries reveal how these long-lost people built an advanced society in the hostile jungle.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for MH370
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade uses recent discoveries and cutting-edge technology to investigate the whereabouts of flight MH370, and what he uncovers points to an overlooked stretch of water.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Caligula's Forbidden Fleet
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates evidence of a lost fleet of ancient ships that once belonged to Rome's mad emperor, and using cutting-edge tech, he reveals these wrecks' link to one of the twentieth century's greatest villains.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Battle of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop, Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: An Ohio mother is brutally murdered. A detective pursues the wrong suspects, while the real killer walked free. It would take a dedicated sheriff to find a real suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Officer Down
programme.desc: When a uniformed police officer is found murdered in the middle of a deserted road, it's up to Detective Earl Peters to figure out who downed his colleague in cold blood.

programme.title: See No Evil: Beth's Last Party
programme.desc: On December 23rd 2009, Beth von Steinner goes missing. Days later, her frozen body is found in a trash pile behind her house. With no witness or suspects, only CCTV footage can unlock the mystery of who killed her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Officer Down
programme.desc: When a uniformed police officer is found murdered in the middle of a deserted road, it's up to Detective Earl Peters to figure out who downed his colleague in cold blood.

programme.title: See No Evil: Rhonda's Gone
programme.desc: On December 2nd 2014, Rhonda Daugherty vanishes. Detectives turn to the public for information on her mysterious disappearance. A tip leads investigators to surveillance footage from a hotel where they uncover a journey of duplicity and deception.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Investigating the strange tale of two double murders, five years apart, that shook two quiet Omaha neighbourhoods and led police to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Houseknives
programme.desc: Two families with several children between them get along famously until one of the mothers starts to dictate to the other how she should be raising her kids. Battle lines are drawn, violence flares, and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Burn Neighbor, Burn
programme.desc: In peaceful Alden, New York, siblings who live in neighboring houses get into a conflict when their prodigal brother returns home. Soon, the family is at each other's throats until their war finally comes to a shocking, fiery end.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: All Tied Up and Nowhere to Go
programme.desc: Orange County, California is known for sun, sand and surf...and murder. A local family that has pulled itself from rags to riches will soon find it's luck has run out when murder comes knocking.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: The Four Horsemen
programme.desc: Bigfork, Montana is known for producing hearty men. Some are so rugged they seem programmed for murder. This tiny town will soon face not one--but two--murders, that appear random but are actually connected in a shocking way.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: A Deadly Education
programme.desc: Facades are shed to reveal jealousy and vengeance that result in murder within a family.

programme.title: Evil Kin: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: Neighbours Kay Parsons and Becky Sears are practically family, working together and raising their children side by side. But being so close leads to trouble. Scandal and murder spin the town gossip out of control and leave both families forever damaged.

programme.title: Evil Kin: Road Kill
programme.desc: When Gary Tison is sent to prison, his family will stop at nothing to break him out. On the loose, Gary and his sons will pay for their freedom by committing one of the most horrific crimes in Arizona history.

programme.title: Evil Kin: Don't Turn on Me
programme.desc: The Fuss's believe all their dreams are coming true. But life inside their home quickly turns into a nightmare. A sibling rivalry spirals out of control and reaches a new level of depravity, and ultimately leads to death.

programme.title: Evil Kin: Never Forgive Never Forget
programme.desc: Ed and Minnie Maurin believe in kindness above all else. But when evil strikes the sweet couple, a small town is plunged into a terrifying mystery. Police navigate a windy road of secrets and deception to find a family of monsters hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Night of the Machete
programme.desc: Two young couples in an Idaho apartment building walk on eggshells around a neighbor who can't stand the one couple's music and the other's dog. Tensions keep rising between all parties until finally hell breaks loose and a violent rampage erupts.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Feud on the Frontier
programme.desc: Two neighboring frontiersmen get along great until one's dog frightens the other's daughter and grandson. It's soon all out war that will leave one of them shot dead and the other in a white knuckle standoff with police.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Smoking Guns

Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Newlyweds Renovate Down the Shore
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jamie and Emily both grew up going to the Jersey Shore for family vacations. Now they're looking for a beachside bargain that they can renovate, but that might be tough to come by near the beaches of the Greater Atlantic City.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Sliding Into Paradise
programme.desc: A young Tennessee family's steep backyard has made it impossible to enjoy. Kyle and Justin build a family fun zone that includes a waterfall, a fire pit, and a custom waterslide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tennessee Dream Pool
programme.desc: The Yarbrough family, Franklin Tennessee locals, call upon the experts at Peek Pools and Spas to build their dream pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race

programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Take Your Doc to Work Day / Blazer's Bike

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town

programme.title: The Office: Tallahassee
programme.desc: After Dwight and his team arrive in Tallahassee, Dwight competes with his coworkers to impress Sabre special projects president, Nellie Bertram.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl

programme.title: The Office: Angry Andy

programme.title: The Office: Fundraiser

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murdered Bride
programme.desc: A case quickly goes cold for the LAPD in 1986 until 20 years later when DNA testing provides a new lead. The initial investigation searched for a male killer, but the DNA results reveal that they are looking for a woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: In 1982 the first of over 50 victims of America's most prolific serial killer were discovered. After being at large for two decades, 'forensic microscopy' was used to link the women to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Poisoned
programme.desc: The Raneys build the Rains a hillside garden, turn a cave into a goat fortress, and find uncontaminated water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: To Build and Protect
programme.desc: Marty builds a bridge across a creek to save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose. After a couple's dog is killed, the Raneys help protect them so they are not the next victims. The Raneys are shocked to find a bear den near their homestead.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Leaving Treasure Island
programme.desc: Host Bear Grylls returns to pick up the islanders, who reflect on how they coped with the brutal conditions and with each other. They reveal how the hidden cash motivated them to explore more of the island, helping provide the camp with food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: To Build and Protect
programme.desc: Marty builds a bridge across a creek to save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose. After a couple's dog is killed, the Raneys help protect them so they are not the next victims. The Raneys are shocked to find a bear den near their homestead.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Leaving Treasure Island
programme.desc: Host Bear Grylls returns to pick up the islanders, who reflect on how they coped with the brutal conditions and with each other. They reveal how the hidden cash motivated them to explore more of the island, helping provide the camp with food.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Shots Fired
programme.desc: Clayton must haul his 20,000-pound dinosaur fossil over 200 miles to a lab where it will finally be identified. The Harris/Bolan clan chases poachers off of their land and Jared makes a last-ditch effort to bring in some money this season.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Mother Russia
programme.desc: Josh goes behind the Iron Curtain (while staying in his spare bedroom) to explore the cultures and mysteries of the USSR with celebrity guests and expert interviews.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground. Kris battles bad attitudes. One dredge pushes too far into the storm, forcing its crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Was Gonna Gag
programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Is That a Goat?
programme.desc: Retired U.S. Marine, Donny, has been to jail twice because of his hoard. Joyce sees comfort in her doll collection, but others see a creepy obsession.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: Conjoined Twins: Inseparable
programme.desc: Carmen and Lupita are conjoined twins with distinct personalities sharing not only their body, but every moment of their young adult lives and the challenges they face as they fight for their independence, and prepare to for college life away from home.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti

programme.title: Rattled: Nightmare Labour

programme.title: Rattled: Step Up or Ship Out

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
